records.question: Which members have the last name exactly Mclean?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
WHERE member.last_name = 'Mclean'
records.pred_sql: SELECT member_id FROM member WHERE last_name = 'Mclean'

records.question: Which members have the first name Trent with the email trent.smith@lpu.edu and phone number 397-555-3444?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
WHERE member.email = 'trent.smith@lpu.edu' AND member.phone = '397-555-3444' AND member.first_name = 'Trent'
records.pred_sql: SELECT member_id FROM member WHERE email = 'trent.smith@lpu.edu' AND phone = '397-555-3444' AND first_name = 'Trent'

records.question: What members are Presidents with last name Harrison, email sacha.harrison@lpu.edu, phone 840-555-4781, and Large t-shirt size who study Liberal Arts in the Liberal Arts Program at the College of Humanities and Social Sciences?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE member.position = 'President' AND major.college = 'College of Humanities and Social Sciences' AND member.phone = '840-555-4781' AND major.department = 'Liberal Arts Program' AND member.t_shirt_size = 'Large' AND major.major_name = 'Liberal Arts' AND member.email = 'sacha.harrison@lpu.edu' AND member.last_name = 'Harrison'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.member_id FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN major AS T2 ON T1.link_to_major = T2.major_id WHERE T1.position = 'President' AND T1.phone = '840-555-4781' AND T1.t_shirt_size = 'Large' AND T1.email = 'sacha.harrison@lpu.edu' AND T1.last_name = 'Harrison' AND T2.college = 'College of Humanities and Social Sciences' AND T2.department = 'Liberal Arts Program' AND T2.major_name = 'Liberal Arts'

records.question: Which members have income received on or after 2019-09-16 and also have attendance and expenses recorded?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
JOIN attendance ON member.member_id = attendance.link_to_member
JOIN expense ON member.member_id = expense.link_to_member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE income.date_received >= '2019-09-16'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.member_id FROM member AS T1 WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM attendance AS T2 WHERE T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM expense AS T3 WHERE T1.member_id = T3.link_to_member ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM income AS T4 WHERE T1.member_id = T4.link_to_member AND T4.date_received >= '2019-09-16' )

records.question: Which members have the first name exactly 'Keaton', have the position exactly 'Inactive', belong to the major whose department is exactly 'Political Science Department', and also have related attendance and major records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
JOIN attendance ON member.member_id = attendance.link_to_member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE member.first_name = 'Keaton' AND member.position = 'Inactive' AND major.department = 'Political Science Department'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.member_id
FROM member AS T1
INNER JOIN attendance AS T2
  ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member
INNER JOIN major AS T3
  ON T1.link_to_major = T3.major_id
WHERE
  T1.first_name = 'Keaton' AND T1.position = 'Inactive' AND T3.department = 'Political Science Department'

records.question: Who is the member with the email connor.hilton@lpu.edu, first name Connor, last name Hilton, phone 454-555-7970, position Member, and t-shirt size X-Large?

records.pred_sql: SELECT member_id FROM member WHERE email = 'connor.hilton@lpu.edu' AND t_shirt_size = 'X-Large' AND first_name = 'Connor' AND position = 'Member' AND phone = '454-555-7970' AND last_name = 'Hilton'

records.question: Which members who have recorded attendance and have a major in the Political Science Department are included?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
JOIN attendance ON member.member_id = attendance.link_to_member
JOIN major ON member.link_to_major = major.major_id
WHERE major.department = 'Political Science Department'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.member_id FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN major AS T3 ON T1.link_to_major = T3.major_id WHERE T3.department = 'Political Science Department'

records.question: Which members have the last name exactly equal to 'Harrison', have a phone number exactly equal to '840-555-4781', have a t-shirt size exactly equal to 'Large', have related expense records with an expense description exactly equal to 'Posters', with approved status exactly equal to 'true' and an expense date at most '2019-09-04', and also have related income records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT member.member_id FROM member
JOIN expense ON member.member_id = expense.link_to_member
JOIN income ON member.member_id = income.link_to_member
WHERE member.last_name = 'Harrison' AND expense.approved = 'true' AND expense.expense_date <= '2019-09-04' AND member.phone = '840-555-4781' AND member.t_shirt_size = 'Large' AND expense.expense_description = 'Posters'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.member_id FROM member AS T1 WHERE T1.last_name = 'Harrison' AND T1.phone = '840-555-4781' AND T1.t_shirt_size = 'Large' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM expense AS T2 WHERE T2.link_to_member = T1.member_id AND T2.approved = 'true' AND T2.expense_date <= '2019-09-04' AND T2.expense_description = 'Posters' ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM income AS T3 WHERE T3.link_to_member = T1.member_id )
